name: generate_simple_project_harness
description: Generate harness for a simple project
expected_behavior: Does not create formal ADR without evidence
Marks uncertain business terms as UNKNOWN or low confidence

name: evaluate_fake_adr
expected_behavior: Does not treat the harness as valid

name: sync_new_route
description: Sync harness after new route added
expected_behavior: Detects new route or module change
Updates or proposes update to CONTEXT-MAP.md
Does not invent business meaning for the route

name: create_context_pack_for_auth_bug
description: Create minimal context pack for bug fix
query: create context pack for fixing login redirect bug on mobile
expected_behavior: Classifies task as bug-fix and auth/frontend affected area
Includes required context files from CONTEXT-MAP
Lists stop conditions for auth contract changes

name: review_harness_diff_weakened_boundary
description: Reject harness diff that loosens control systems
query: review harness diff where dependency changes moved from Requires Approval to Allowed
expected_behavior: Explains why dependency changes require approval
